mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_teacher (course_id, teacher_id, teacher_name, teaching_class_id, is_main_teacher) VALUES (#{course_id}, #{teacher_id}, #{teacher_name}, #{teaching_class_id}, #{is_main_teacher})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM course_teacher WHERE course_id = #{course_id} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM course_teacher WHERE teacher_id = #{teacher_id} ORDER BY course_id
SELECT * FROM course_teacher WHERE teaching_class_id = #{teaching_class_id} ORDER BY is_main_teacher DESC, id ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM course_teacher WHERE course_id = #{course_id} AND teacher_id = #{teacher_id}
